payload.label: side table
payload.long_description: Tall, narrow dark-brown varnished wooden side table with ornate carved moldings and recessed panel details, small tabletop holding dishes, partially occluded by a leather sofa at the left edge of the crop; base plinth visible — estimated ~0.9 m from camera.
